chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yahya Ibn Abi 'imran

text: و ما كان فيه عن يحيى بن أبي عمران فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن يحيى بن أبي عمران، و كان‌ تلميذ يونس بن عبد الرّحمن‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Yahya ibn Abi 'Imran has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Yahya ibn Abi 'Imran. He was a student of Yunus ibn 'Abd Al-Rahman.
